name: cogniva-dev
description: Cogniva's development toolkit: pre-planning idea exploration (explore-idea), human-confirmed architectural decision records with provenance and relitigation weight (auto-doc), deferred work capture (backlog), repo scaffolding (repo-init, add-module), the feature lifecycle (plan-feature, execute-feature, quick-fix) with isolated-worktree execution and ledger-based cleanup (cleanup-work, cleanup-allwork), Module dependency-graph generation (module-deps), and read-only status roll-ups (feature-status, module-status, repo-status, workflow-status).
